prose:
**Fukui reactivity of nitrobenzene** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF via chemkit, gas phase (implicit solvation omitted), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`, single-point calculation (no geometry optimization). Partial charges scheme: Mulliken. SCF converged without errors. Computed atom-condensed Fukui indices using charges: fuka_plus (f⁺) array with C4 as the most electrophilic atom (atom index 3, label 4) with f⁺ = 0.49641781. Command: ```
chemkit fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  --stdout path --out nitrobenzene_fukui_standard.json
``` Result file: `nitrobenzene_fukui_standard.json`, live log (while running) at `fukui_20260704-152231.out`.
